newsSince: The DRAM super-cycle intensified: TrendForce sees Q2 mainstream DRAM contract prices up 58-63% QoQ with the rally extending into 2027; Winbond's capacity is sold out through 2027 and it now projects the DRAM supply gap to extend beyond 2028, with record monthly revenue prints. On June 2, Winbond hit limit-up to record highs alongside Nanya on foreign-broker upgrades; it then ran another ~35% over the two weeks to +133% YTD.

sources.label: BigGo - Nanya & Winbond hit limit-up, foreign brokers upgrade
TrendForce - Winbond DRAM ~4x by June 2026, booked through 2027

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: HBM crowding out commodity DRAM keeps tightening Winbond's niche/specialty DRAM - Q2 contract prices +58-63% QoQ, capacity sold out through 2027 and supply gap now projected beyond 2028. That is fresh, thesis-strengthening evidence (not just the price spike), supporting a modest up from rank 88.
verdicts.bull: Specialty DRAM/NOR sold out through 2027, supply gap to 2028+; record monthly revenue as HBM crowds out commodity DRAM.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck is real but Winbond is a price-taker in a famously cyclical market; much is now priced.
verdicts.bear: +133% YTD and a +35% two-week limit-up run on broker upgrades; memory rerating leaves it exposed to any cycle wobble.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Memory-cycle reversal; valuation already discounts tightness
